answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like leading, organizing, and making decisions
Remote or flexible — I work best independently

steps.title: Foundations

tasks: Set up your learning workspace

children.title: Industry Fundamentals
children.objective: Understand the core concepts of frontend developer
tasks: Learn to translate UI/UX designs into responsive, high-performing web pages
Complete an associate or bachelor's degree in computer science, web design, or software engineering
Become proficient in at least one major frontend framework like React or Vue
Apply for frontend developer or UI engineer roles
Understand state management and API integration for dynamic interfaces

tasks: Research standard tools for frontend developer

Create account on professional networks
